titleStmt.title: SII 35.60: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 60. (A.R. No. 96 of 1951-52.) RAṬṬIHAḶḶI, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone standing near the Kadaṁbēśvara temple.

This long record in beautiful Kannaḍa prose and verse is unfortunately damaged. The inscription commences with the invocatory verses in praise of lord Śiva and gives a genealogical account of the Chālukyas down to pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalla II, the ruling king. He entrusted the administration of the Banavāsi country to his officer, manneveggaḍe, haḍapavaḷa Bammideva-daṇḍādhīśa who, however, transferred it to his younger brother Mādhava-chamūnātha.

After eulogising Raṭṭahaḷḷi, the chief town of Nūṟuṁbāḍa, a division of one Hundred, which was a kaṁpaṇa of Banavāsināḍu, the record gives a genealogical account of the chiefs of this division who belonged to Kadamba family.

The record then refers to the minister of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kētarasa, viz. Sōmanātha or Sōvaṇṇa. He was the son of Bhāskarārya and Māḷikavve of Atri-gōtra and had two elder brothers Rāyarasa, and Malla. Malla held the office of sandhivigrahi while Sōvaṇa was the mantri.
The continuation of the record from here is lost since the engraved slab is broken and lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . jaya
tyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇō¨rvvārāhaṁkṣōbhitā¨rṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnnatadaṁṣṭāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ
śrīmatraiḷōkyalakṣmīmaṇimukhamukuraṁpā¨rbbatīhritsarōjaprēmaprōddāmadhāmaṁ sura
narakhacarastōtrapātraṁ triṇētraṁ sōmēśaṁ maṁtra sōmaṁgabhimataghaḷamaṁ mā¨rkke
gaṁgātaraṁgastōmaṁ prōdubhūta śōbhatukaṇanicayajaṭājūṭadēśaṁ mahēśaṁ . ©
ghanaveṁpāvanaśaṁkhaviddru malatāsaṁkī¨rṇakaṁ sūktisaṁjanitānēka viśuddhamauktikacayaṁ kācaṁ prabhābhāsa
jīvanasaṁcāritanakracakramakaraprōccaṇḍaśuṇḍāḷako¨rmmanikāyaṁ viḷasattaraṁgalatikā dī¨rṇnā¨rṇavaṁ raṁ
jikuṁ . rājīvākṣādrigaṁ viṁdhyagirigavesevā ha¨rmmyadhārādharakkaṁ rājattārācaḷakkaṁ maḷeyagiriga
mānīḷakutukīḷakaṁ nivyājaṁ celvāgi nīḷduṁnatiyinesada mēdi diṁdatā jaṁbūdvīpa madhyasthitamenisi
mahāmēru kaṇgoppi tō¨rkuṁ . nirutaṁ mēruge suttamoppuvudu jaṁbūdvīpamā dvīpadoḷu
bharatakṣētramagu¨rvuvettasevudā kṣētrakkadā ¨rnō¨rppaḍaṁ siriyantippudu kuntaḷō¨rvvi pesa¨rvvettā kuntaḷādhīśa
roḷu piriyaṁ śatrukuḷāpahōṁnata jayaśrī lōlupaṁ tailapaṁ . ghanatējōnidhiyappa tailana sutaṁ satyāśraThe letterta is written above the line in smaller character.
yaṁ taṁnripāḷana taṁmmaṁ vibhuvikramaṁ tadanujaṁ saṁdayyaṇaṁ tanmahīśana taṁma jayasiṁhanātana magaṁ
traiḷōkyamallāṁkanītanenippāhavamallanātana magaṁ sōmēśvarō¨rvvīśvara . Ātana tammaṁ bhūvikhyātaṁ cāḷukyarāmananpa
ma mahimōpētaṁ ripubhūpāḷamahītaḷasaṁhāramū¨rtti pe¨rmmāḍinripa . pesa¨rvvettaggaḷadādi rājavibhavakkāvā
savāgi māgi¨rda sāhasi pe¨rmmāḍinripāḷanātana magaṁ śrīrāja sa¨rvvajñanaṁ besakaṁ bettava nīśanapratimatējōvallabhaṁ satkaḷāThe letters vāgi are redundant.
vasataṁ rāyajhaḷappanū¨rjitayaśaṁ sōmēśvarō¨rvvīśvaraṁ . nripanuṁ rāmanumādiyāge palaruṁ bhūmīśarā¨rdda¨rjjisaItsatkaḷāvataṁsa
gaḷalu bhūmiyanantava¨rgge jasadiṁ dha¨rmmaṁgaḷiṁ dānadiṁ dviguṇaṁ tānivaneṁbidaṁ budhajanaṁ vyāva¨rṇnisaltāḷdidaṁ jagamaṁ śrījagadēkamallanadaṭiṁ
sōmēśvaragrātmajaṁ . sadamaḷakī¨rttiyaṁ madanamūttiyanisiva taṁna niṁnaneṁbude purukutsasaṁbaru purūravaneṁbudu kā¨rttivī¨ryya
neṁbudu sagarēśaneṁbudu bhagīrathaneṁbudu rāmacaṁdraneṁbudu naḷaneṁbudādinripamā¨rggananī jagadēkamallana . vacana . svasti samasta
bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matpratāpacakrava¨rti jagadēkamalladēvaru vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamā na caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttaṁ kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyvuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . Anatārāti nri
pāḷarananēkara patipadāṁbujakeṟagisidaṁ maneveggaḍe haḍapavaḷaṁ janavinutaṁ baṁmadēva daṇḍādhīśa . Ittaṁ śrījagadēka
mallana suhṛtsellaṁ lasadbhaktigaṁcittaṁ bettireviṁgadoldu banavāsidēśamaṁ sadguṇāyattaṁ gudghayaśaṁge baṁmaṇa
camūpaṁgātananteyda kū¨rttittaṁ taṁnanujaṁge mādhavacamūnāthaṁgatiprītiyiṁ . banavasenāḍoḷelli naḍenō¨rppaḍamalli
ya ramyava¨rppa nandanavanamalli rājisuva heggaṟeyalliye śōbhevetta kabbina posadōṁṭa malliye virājita pū
goḷavalli kōkiḷasvanada viḷāsavalli beḷegeya ḷa dhānyaṁ samriddha saṁkuḷa . kaṁ . Ā nāḍa kaṁpaṇaṁ vasudhānārī tiḷakadaṁte raṁjisi su
khasantānadoḷesevudu siriyiṁ tānaggaḷavāgiresedu nūṟuṁbāḍa . nōḍa kaḍaṁbara rājyakrīḍābhavanakke tāne ka
rugaṁba nāḍāḍiya rūḍhiya nūṟuṁbāḍadaṁte raṭṭahaḷḷi rājāvāsa . vri . baḷasida nandanāḷi baḷedoppuva
cūtalatāḷi puṣpasaṁkuḷada vanāḷi pāḍuva madāḷi kukilva pikāḷi taṇpugoṇḍeḷasuva gāḷi śāḷivanadōḷi podaḷda śukā
ḷi śōbheyaṁ taḷadire raṭṭahaḷḷi ramaṇīyatara vasudhāṁtarāḷadoḷu . ka . palavu dēvāyatanada kaḷasada tiṁtiṇiya kāṁ
tisaṁtānakadiṁde pogaḷuttiraludayācaḷamaṁ śrīraṭṭahaḷḷi neneyisuti¨rkku . sarasijaga¨rbbhanaṁ neṟeya pōldu dharāmarariṁde ba
lpu vistarisi negaḷda kuṁnulana boppalanaṁ narenippa vīrariṁ parakalisutte sutti paridi¨rdda kumudyutiyaṁ nagaṁgaḷiṁ parikise raṭṭahaḷḷi karavūppu
vudabhiparīta dhātriyoḷu . v® . toḷapaṁ kadapinōḷī guruḷudda nosalugaḷa kāminī janaṁgaḷa viḷāsadiṁ dhanadanaṁnarenippa vaṇigujanaṁThe letter nī is engraved below the line in smaller character.
gaḷaggaḷikeyoḷā yugandharananēḷipa maṁtrisamūhadiṁ jagattiḷakanenippa bhūpatiyinēṁ pesaraggamō raṭṭahaḷḷiya . va .
raṭṭahaḷḷiyadhināthananvayakhyātiyentendaḍe . vri . munisiṁdāntarisi negeydi hayadiṁ mattēbhakuṁbhakke toṭṭane pāyde
ṟidara paḍalcaḍisutaṁ taddantiyaṁ cakrigiṁbane tānoppisi pettana śramade nūṟuṁbāḍamaṁ bīradēvana bīrakkaḻdiguṁdadi¨rppadaṭarāriṁnuṁ
mahīcakradoḷu . Āmahipānujaṁ nega¨rdda kētamahībhujanātanātmajaṁ nāmamahīśanātana magaṁ vibhukētarasaṁ kadaṁ
bacūḍāmaṇiyā mahātmaṁgesevagrasutaṁ polakēsidēvanantā manmā¨rganānujanaṁ vaṁ nega¨rddaṁ kali pe¨rmmabhūbhuja . kaṁ . hara
pādapadmabhriṁga varāṁganānaṁdanasīmasāhasatuṁgaṁ parahitaguṇaprasaṁgaṁ dharegesedaṁ raṇakidēvanadaṭara dēva .
kētarasanarasi mahībhrijjātegaruṁnthatige ratige raṁbhegesavaneṁbātatayaśamaṁ paḍedaḷmātēṁ nega¨rddattimabbevanitā
ratuna . Avarīvva¨rggaṁ puṭṭidaravanīśa¨rbbiradēvaṁ baṁmarasaṁ śātravahritsella mallaṁ bhuvanastutaravara peṁpanēvaṇni
pudō . Antavarī¨rvvariṁ kiṟiyaṁ mallidēvana guṇaprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . vri . manmā¨rggaṁ mallidēvaṁ sakaḷaguṇagaṇāḷaṁ
kritaṁ mallidēvaṁ vinutāṁgaṁ mallidēvaṁ budhajananiḷayammallidēvaṁ viśiṣṭēṣṭanidānaṁ mallidēva nijakuḷakumudānaṁdanaṁ
mallidēvaṁ vanadhidvīpāvritō¨rvvītaḷavimaḷayaśōvallabha mallidēva . Antātaniṁpiriyaṁ bīradēvana tēja prabhāvamente
ndaḍe . vri . javanavaneveneṁbudaṁ parākramaduṁnati rūḍhivetta siṁgaduṁnati vēgadiṁdiradēṁ bhagamaneydipudaṇmadi
gumadēbhavanuṟadeṁduvaṁḍalevuti¨rppudu bāhubaḷaṁ babāppenutave bagegoṁḍu baṇnisuta vi¨rppudu dhāriṇi bī
radēvana . Enisida bīradēvana manaṟpreye guttakuḷāṁburāsiva¨rddhana śaśilēkhe sa¨rvvaśubhalakṣaṇalakṣitagātre lō
ḷalōcanesupativratāguṇasamanvite dānavinōdeyeṁdu neṭṭane bagegoṁḍu baṇnipudu bācaladēviyanī 1 jagajjanaṁ .
girijegamīśvaraṁgavakhiḷō¨rvvare baṇnise ṣaṇmukhaṁ manōharavene puṭṭidaṁtesedu bācaladēvigavī kaḍaṁbarābharaṇa
menippa bīramahipaṁgavudārada bīradēḷge vistarisire puṭṭidaṁ nega¨rdda kētarasaṁ nijavaṁśava¨rddhana . siḍilapoḍa¨rppanēḷi
suvudugrate nōḍa gajārigeyda rūpiḍuvudu vikramaṁ kuḷikanaṁkoṟacāḍuvudeḷe mrityuvaṁ miḍukadi
reṁdu mūdalipudājñeyenuttire mikka bhūbhuja¨rppaḍiyiḍalentuveṁdorageva¨rppare kētarasaṁge dhātriyoḷu .
Ātanarasiyara mahimeyeṁnteṁdaḍe . Anupamakī¨rttiyantaḷeda kaṁcaladēvige guttavaṁśa saṁjanita suśīḷege la
ḷiyādēvige siṁdakuḷāṁburāsiva¨rddhana sasirēkheyenenippa dōraladēvige mikka rāṇiya¨rjjana vinuta prasiddha guṇadoḷu
doreyappare ma¨rttyalōkadoḷu . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīrārātimaṇḍaḷikama
danamahēśvaraṁ kaḍaṁbavaṁśōdbhavaṁ . cātu¨ryyakamaḷōdbhavaṁ . śākhācarēṁdradhvaja . rūpamakaradhvajaṁ . mrigarāja
lāṁcchana caturaviriṁcana . nāhavāditya . nakhiḷajanastutya . naṇiyaṁkakāṟaṁ . raṇaraṁganīṟaṁ . satyarādhēyaṁ .
śaucagāṁgēyaṁ . paranārīsahōdaraṁ . vīravrikōdaraṁ . baṁṭara bhāva . desekāṟara dēvaṁ . maṁḍaḷikagaruḍa
kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
kētarasarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttumire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . bhuvanajanastutakke nele
yāda kaḍaṁbara rājyalakṣmigiṁtivare mahāpradhānarivareṁdude mātivariṁdavādudutsava mivaroldu kaṭṭidude kaṁṭhikeyaṭṭude boṭṭenutte bhūbhu
vanamadoldu baṇnipudu kēvaḷavādude sōmananvaya . Āviprānvayadalliyatrimunigōtraṁ puṭṭidaṁ bhāskarā¨ryya viprōttamanā ma
hātma sati peṁpaṁ tāḷdidaḷu celviniṁdī viprōttame māḷikavveyava¨rggāda¨rṇnandana¨rmmūvaruṁ śrī viprottamaroldu rāyarasanuṁ śrīmallanuṁ sō
manu . vigrahavadatti baṁdaḍanugrahisalsandi geldu baṁdaḍe śāpānugrahadiṁ rakṣisalsamagranivaṁ namma saṁdivigrahi malla . vri . Anupama
kī¨rtti rāmanoḍavuṭṭida lakṣmaṇanante puṇyabhājananenisi¨rddamallanoḍavuṭṭidaniṣṭara kāmadhēnu sajjanara nidhānavāśrita kaḷpakujaṁ
parivāravellavaṁ manadanurāgadiṁ poreva taṁde yaśōnidhi mantri sōvaṇaṁ . mahime ja mātravaṟitaṁ śrutadavi
raṇaṁ sahajavenippa cāturate padabhavaṁge matiprakāśamoḷpu harahamā¨rggamutsa diṭa veṁdaḍe
gaḷadavanaṁ pogaḷa sōmananudgha [.] yaśōbhirāmana . pati hitadeḍeyo
najaniṁ migilītaneṁdu dhare sele pogaḷguṁ śrīsōmanāthanaṁ nidhiyaṁ . vinuta
stana bhāspaṁ navamaṇḍanuṁ taruṇamaṁdāraprabhābhā
draṁ peṟanallaneṁbudu jagaṁ śrī kāṁ
tavegaṁ śrēyaskaranū ¨rdda
śrīsōmanāthadēvara
Digital edition of SII 35.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
